title: (ENG)여자가 남자를 좋아할 때 하는 무의식적 여자 호감 신호 행동 Eight ways to know if she's into you
text: Hello, this is Cha Hee Yeon from Dr. Cha's Psychology TV You must have wondered how women act when they're into a guy, right? Men feel a lot of pressure to be the ones to make the first move on women So it happens that when men don't realize the signs that women are into them they make the mistake of making a move on a woman who is not yet ready, who is not fully certain, by trying to touch her too soon or trying to get physical or trying to move into a relationship too soon and mistakes like these Then women will back off immediately and end things! The woman will think , "he's not a serious type" "he's probably like this with all women" Once she thinks of you in this way it's over So if you were to understand the unconscious behaviors women do when they're into a guy then you would know how a woman feels and the right time to make a move on her So I will tell you the 8 unconscious behaviors women do when they like a man [Dr. Cha's Psychology TV] The first is.. 1. When she tilts her head as she talks As we notice when we take selfies it's more likely that we look prettier when our head is tilted in terms of our jawline or the way our hair falls or our shoulders or figure can look better that way Therefore! Women have the desire to show their best side to men! Everyone knows unconsciously the pose or facial expression or angle that that they look the best in So when you see a woman tilt her head or pose like this you can think, "she's trying to look her best in front of me" The second is.. 2. When she pulls her chair to the front When men don't notice these things they often get very confused about the signals women send You have to look at how she pulls her chair, whether she is leaning forward or backward, and things like this If she pulls her chair towards a man to lean in his direction this is an unconscious behavior that shows she is into the guy! All human relationships have their distances When you extend your arm like this the length from here to the wrist is called "social distance" When you're sitting at a table and you can extend your hand into the space between you and the other person you consider that person to be close to you! But if you feel more comfortable outside of that distance

title: (ENG)여자가 남자를 좋아할 때 하는 무의식적 여자 호감 신호 행동 Eight ways to know if she's into you
text: t is called "social distance" When you're sitting at a table and you can extend your hand into the space between you and the other person you consider that person to be close to you! But if you feel more comfortable outside of that distance then you don't consider that person very close yet! So, with regard to "social distance" your body moves according to your heart So if someone who was sitting far away before is now leaning forward and inching closer, this means that they feel open towards the other person! It means, "I feel close to this person!" It means, "I am attracted to you!" This is how you can understand it One's physical distance shortens as their psychological distance lessens So psychological distance lessens gradually Just because she moves closer to you don't suddenly touch her or pat her shoulder or anything rash like this! When you're at that beginning phase you have to make very gentle physical contact You have to be gentle If you grasp her too tightly or too hard.. Women hate that! So observe how close you are sitting and make gentle contact based on that distance You have to adjust your physical contact based on that Now for the third.. 3. When she makes continuous eye contact! When a woman is interested in a man she will make eye contact, with sparkles in her eyes, and talk to him as she looks straight into him What's funny is that eye contact differs for men and women When a man is interested in a woman they actually can't make eye contact! But for women, if they're into a guy, they can make full eye contact when they're having a conversation Then it's the man who avoids eye contact So you see it's a bit different for men and women Women make eye contact with men during conversation when they're into them But keep in mind, however, that when it comes to attraction there's attraction to someone as a man but also attraction to someone as a person She first feels attracted to you as a person and then finds you attractive as a man So she might look at you and laugh while talking to you and continue to make eye contact and show signs like these but it is very likely that this is her being attracted to you as a person So if she's making good eye contact with you at least she thinks of you positively and considers to be close to you You can know that much 4. When she touches her hair In front of someone she likes a woman will unconsciously push her hair back or touch and straighten her hair This is behavior which comes

title: (ENG)여자가 남자를 좋아할 때 하는 무의식적 여자 호감 신호 행동 Eight ways to know if she's into you
text: of you positively and considers to be close to you You can know that much 4. When she touches her hair In front of someone she likes a woman will unconsciously push her hair back or touch and straighten her hair This is behavior which comes out when one is nervous or excited She is unconsciously trying to appeal her femininity So the unconscious behavior of touching one's hair is another instance of someone trying to impress or look their best to another person! The fifth is.. 5. When her pitch gets higher Instinctively, women are attracted to men's low-pitched voices and men are attracted to women's cutesy voices They like high-pitched voices~ So if a woman's pitch is higher than usual then you can consider that to be a sign of interest Our voices get higher when we're in a good mood, right? And when I meet someone I like, I'm in a good mood That's how you can think about it 6. Her reactions This means that she will listen very attentively and actively react to what you say When a woman is uninterested in a man she will still listen to him but will not react to him as generously Generous reactions are a sign of interest to the other person But! Often women are naturally much more responsive But even then, if she's really into you she'll react even more than usual, laughing brightly, clapping~ and making physical contact~ and so on But if she's not in to you, she'll look away, she'll become distracted or start touching her phone Her reactions will be different So observe how she responds to you 7. When she neatens her clothing We can think of the act of neatening as unconsciously wanting to seem perfect to the other person You can think of these acts of neatening the clothes or touching the jewelry as an appeal of femininity 8. Palming The act of unconsciously showing one's palms or wrists during conversation is called "palming" Psychologically, when you're on guard, you clench your fists or keep them closed like this But! once you relax, you start showing your palms and wrists "Smell my fragrance~" "I put on perfume~" This may just seem like a cutesy thing to do but women do this because they are no longer on guard psychologically So these were the 8 unconscious behaviors that women do when they're into a man Men should be thinking about how to make a move based on these unconscious signals But don't come on so hard just because you notice these signs because during the beginning phase, even a small misstep can turn attraction into

title: (ENG)여자가 남자를 좋아할 때 하는 무의식적 여자 호감 신호 행동 Eight ways to know if she's into you
text: re into a man Men should be thinking about how to make a move based on these unconscious signals But don't come on so hard just because you notice these signs because during the beginning phase, even a small misstep can turn attraction into repulsion very easily So when there is attraction be even more respectful.. and courteous.. and don't rush things Try to have more time to become more intimate During this period, if you make physical contact keep it to gentle touches like this If a woman sits still as your touch her like that you can think she's into you and that you can take this relationship further After that, try lingering a bit longer But if she's not ready and you go from a slight touch to a sudden grasping or grasping her here or there women will absolutely hate it Or suddenly reaching for her waist Women hate stuff like this! So don't ever behave like this Only make gentle physical contact And if you need to pull her in while you're walking just touch her this much Just using one finger to push her in and she'll get the message So if she doesn't resist these things then you can continue to see her more frequently But if she suddenly freezes up when you touch her then don't ever attempt it again If you do, you'll lose her in a blink of an eye I hope this video was helpful Thank you~
